description: Migration schema test: statuses gains board ownership support for ticket statuses without changing non-ticket status shapes.
Migration schema test: board-scoped ticket status uniqueness/index definitions exist and board lookups use them.
DB integration: migration clones every current tenant ticket status to every board and preserves metadata fields.
DB integration: cloned board-owned ticket statuses receive fresh status ids and preserve per-board default/open-closed ordering semantics.
DB integration: migration remap table or remap logic resolves old global ticket status ids to the correct board-owned replacement by board.
DB integration: ticket rows are rewritten to the board-owned status id for their current board during migration.
DB integration: inbound ticket defaults are remapped to board-owned ticket status ids using their stored board id.
DB integration: tenant billing renewal defaults are remapped to board-owned ticket status ids using renewal_ticket_board_id.
DB integration: contract-level renewal overrides are remapped to board-owned ticket status ids using renewal_ticket_board_id.
Workflow migration test: saved workflow ticket status references with explicit board context are remapped to board-owned status ids.
Migration guard test: persisted ticket status references without safe board context are surfaced as unresolved instead of guessed.
Unit: default ticket status helper returns the default status for a specific board, not the tenant-wide first ticket status.
Unit: ticket create validation rejects a status id that belongs to a different board.
DB-backed integration: ticket create succeeds when status_id belongs to the chosen board and fails otherwise.
Unit: ticket update validation rejects cross-board status ids when changing status only.
DB-backed integration: ticket update rejects incompatible board/status combinations and preserves prior status on failure.
UI integration: changing a ticket board clears the current status selection and requires an explicit destination-board status choice.
UI integration: board creation supports copying ticket statuses from an existing board and persists a cloned board-local set.
UI integration: board creation supports inline ticket status authoring before the board is saved.
UI validation: board create/edit blocks save if there is no valid open default ticket status.
UI integration: board edit loads only that board's ticket statuses into the embedded board-local status manager.
UI integration: central ticket status settings no longer render ticket status management as an active source of truth.
Unit: board-scoped ticket status create action writes board_id and rejects duplicate ticket status names within the same board only.
Unit: board-scoped ticket status update action cannot move or mutate a status across boards implicitly.
Unit: board-local ticket status rules preserve exactly one default behavior per board and keep other boards untouched.
Unit: deleting or closing the final valid default/open ticket status on a board is rejected with a clear validation error.
Component test: board-dependent ticket status picker loads options for the selected board only.
Component test: board-dependent ticket status picker is empty or disabled when no board is selected.
UI integration: ticket create flow does not auto-populate a status until a board is selected and then chooses that board's default status only.
UI integration: ticket edit flow reloads board-owned statuses when board changes and never shows statuses from other boards.
Regression test: quick add ticket flow uses board-scoped ticket statuses.
Regression test: bulk ticket update flow validates board-scoped status selections.
Regression test: auxiliary board-aware ticket creation helpers such as asset or project-linked ticket creation use board-scoped statuses.
UI integration: inbound ticket defaults only offer statuses from the selected board and clear invalid values when board changes.
UI integration: billing renewal defaults only offer statuses from the selected board and reject stale cross-board ids on save.
Workflow designer test: ticket create/update status pickers depend on the selected board and do not expose tenant-global ticket statuses.
Workflow runtime test: ticket create action rejects a status id that does not belong to the chosen board.
Workflow runtime test: ticket update action rejects a cross-board status id when patching board/status fields.
Workflow runtime test: ticket close helper resolves the closed ticket status from the ticket's current board-owned statuses.
Workflow runtime test: board-aware default/open status helpers do not fall back to another board's ticket statuses.
Client portal integration: portal ticket creation uses only statuses valid for the chosen board.
Client portal integration: portal ticket status update rejects invalid cross-board statuses.
API contract test: ticket status lookup API requires or honors board scope and returns only statuses for that board.
API contract test: generic status list/read endpoints no longer expose tenant-global ticket status behavior for ticket use cases.
DB-backed integration: ticket list and search joins still return the correct status name/open-closed metadata after board-owned migration.
DB-backed integration: ticket reporting and grouped status counts do not mix statuses across boards after migration.
SLA integration: pause configuration UI and persistence continue to work with board-owned ticket statuses.
SLA integration: reporting and pause evaluation continue to resolve remapped board-owned ticket statuses correctly.
Notification integration: internal notification subscriber resolves old/new board-owned ticket status names correctly after migration.
Survey integration: survey trigger conditions continue to match remapped board-owned ticket status ids correctly.
Onboarding integration: onboarding-created boards receive board-owned ticket statuses and a valid board-local default status.
Import integration: board import/status seed flows create ticket statuses scoped to the target board.
Fixture integration: shared test setup creates board-owned ticket statuses instead of tenant-global ticket statuses.
Workflow harness integration: workflow fixture setup resolves and seeds board-owned ticket statuses correctly for ticket status scenarios.
Migration test suite includes one happy-path DB integration proving clone/remap correctness on a tenant with multiple boards.
Migration test suite includes one failure/guard case proving unresolved no-board-context references are surfaced explicitly.
Playwright or equivalent UI coverage verifies board create with copied statuses, inline statuses, and board-local status editing.
Playwright or equivalent UI coverage verifies ticket board change requires explicit reselection of a valid destination-board status.
Workflow regression suite proves migrated saved workflow status references still execute against the intended board-owned ticket statuses.
Billing regression suite proves migrated tenant and contract renewal defaults still create tickets with the intended board-owned status ids.
API regression suite proves ticket create/update endpoints reject cross-board status ids and accept valid board-owned status ids.
Client portal regression suite proves board-scoped ticket status lookups and updates behave correctly after migration.
